export class SetTargetComposer{/**
     * Lock onto a user for commands & UI.
     * @param userId The target's webID/user id in the room
     * @param lock true = lock onto user, false = unlock/clear target
     */constructor(userId,lock){this._data=void 0;this._data=[userId,lock?1:0];console.log('[📤] SetTargetComposer:',this._data);}getMessageArray(){return this._data;}dispose(){/* noop */}}
